name: German Stew
recipeIngredient: 1.5 lb Potatoes, peeled, cut into large chunks (4 cups)
3 lbs Stew beef, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large saucepan.
2. Add onion and garlic. Sauté until tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Remove onion and garlic with a slotted spoon.
4. Add beef to the pan. Sauté until browned on all sides.
5. Return onion and garlic to the pot.
6. Stir in broth, vinegar, sugar, salt, and bay leaf.
7. Bring mixture to a boil.
8. Reduce heat and simmer covered for about 1.5 hours until meat is tender.
9. Add potatoes, carrots, and dill. Simmer covered until all vegetables are tender, about 20 minutes.
10. Refrigerate overnight.
11. Remove layer of fat before serving.
12. Heat the stew gently, stirring frequently, until warmed through.
13. Mix flour with 1/4 cup water to form a slurry.
14. Stir the slurry into the stew, mixing well.
15. Cook and stir for about 2 minutes until thickened.
